title: senecio helenitis var. pyrenaicus
intro: Senecio helenitis var. pyrenaicus, commonly known as Pyrenean ragwort or Pyrenean groundsel, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as relief from respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. Pyrenean ragwort can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in herbal remedies for its potential to soothe and calm the body.
